milestones.description: Founded under the guidance of Nripendra Saroj Sir.
Ran major online events and expanded student outreach.
Strengthened competition culture through practical bot events.

milestones.event: Technical Skill Growth & Major Fest Engagement
milestones.description: Boosted technical skills through workshops and fest activities.

milestones.event: Expansion into AI, Autonomous Systems & Drones
milestones.description: Expanded into AI, autonomy, and drone systems.

testimonials.quote: The Robotics Club completely transformed my engineering career. The hands-on projects gave me skills no classroom ever could.
testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta

testimonials.quote: From building my first line-follower to leading a team at Robocon — this club gave me purpose and direction.
testimonials.name: Priya Sharma

testimonials.quote: The mentorship culture here is unmatched. Seniors actually sit down and debug with you at 2 AM before competitions.
testimonials.name: Rahul Kumar
